scripts.docs:build: pnpm --filter @neutro/form-core run build && cp packages/core/dist/index.global.js docs/public/form-core.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),f='docs/public/form-core.js';fs.writeFileSync(f,fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').replace(/\/\/#\s*sourceMappingURL=.*\n?/g,''))" && vitepress build docs
